specific_question: As of Q4 2024 and moving into 2025, how do provincial regulations affect what information customer service can provide about billing and medical follow-up?
answer: According to MediConn Solutions' billing department, as of Q3 2024, and moving into 2025, Ontario patients can access provincial telehealth billing codes, reducing out-of-pocket costs by 20%, while British Columbia patients pay standard rates. Customer service cannot provide medical advice on follow-up care, but can explain administrative next steps, like booking referrals.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
